item.title: The Download: Microsoft’s online reality check, and the worrying rise in measles cases

item.title: Job titles of the future: Breast biomechanic

item.title: Community service
item.description: The bird is a beautiful silver-gray, and as she dies twitching in the lasernet I’m grateful for two things: First, that she didn’t make a sound. Secon...

item.title: Measles cases are rising. Other vaccine-preventable infections could be next.
item.description: There’s a measles outbreak happening close to where I live. Since the start of this year, 34 cases have been confirmed in Enfield, a northern borough ...

item.title: Microsoft has a new plan to prove what’s real and what’s AI online
item.description: AI-enabled deception now permeates our online lives. There are the high-profile cases you may easily spot, like when White House officials recently sh...
